text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Daniel Cho confirmed Cirrus Analytics acquisition closed 'on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed.'"},{"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Helena Vargas stated Q3 non-GAAP operating margin was 19.2%, putting them 'on track to deliver full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin at approximately 19 percent.'"},{"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Helena Vargas explicitly stated 'we now expect GAAP operating income to be slightly negative for fiscal 2026' and 'we did not achieve that commitment.'"},{"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Daniel Cho reaffirmed the Q4 2026 GA target for native Cirrus query capabilities, noting 'engineering integration is tracking to plan' but deadline has not yet arrived."},{"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"},{"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Daniel Cho stated 'we are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot,' now expecting GA in fiscal Q2 2027."},{"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas said EMEA is improving and mid-single-digit Q4 growth is 'increasingly confident' but achievable, deadline not yet arrived."},{"commitment_id": 9, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed they 'continue to expect to fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026' but deadline has not yet arrived."},{"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
